title: Marketplace Manager - Country Delight Ventures Solutions - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Country Delight Ventures Solutions - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Country Delight Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Noida team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Country Delight Ventures Solutions:
Country Delight Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Country Delight Ventures Solutions!
